included.text: Daily breakfast and regional dinner meals
Local experienced driver and sightseeing guide
Private air-conditioned transfers for the entire route

itinerary.title: Arrive in Wayanad & Spice Forest Walks
itinerary.description: Arrive in Wayanad. Trek to the ancient Edakkal Caves, see the massive Banasura Sagar Dam, and walk through fragrant spice plantations.

itinerary.title: Drive to Ooty & Lake Boating
itinerary.description: Drive through the Nilgiri forests to Ooty. Visit the Botanical Gardens, take a relaxing boat ride on Ooty Lake, and enjoy the views from Doddabetta Peak.

itinerary.title: Black Thunder Water Park Fun & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive down to Mettupalayam. Spend a full, fun-filled day in the refreshing wave pools, splash rides, and water slides of Black Thunder Theme Park before departing.

title: Wayanad & Ooty: Scenic Hills & Theme Park Tour
description: Immerse yourself in the double hill-station paradise of Wayanad and Ooty, combined with water park fun. Walk through Wayanad's spice forests, cruise Ooty Lake, and enjoy the high-thrill wave pools and water slides of Black Thunder Theme Park.
highlights: Explore Edakkal Caves and Banasura Sagar Dam in Wayanad
Tour Ooty's Botanical Gardens and Doddabetta Peak
Enjoy a full day of water activities at Black Thunder Theme Park
